name: Story
summary: Root manifest for a story project
description: The Story artifact is the root of truth for a complete interactive fiction project. It holds the IFID (Interactive Fiction Identifier - a UUID v4), global metadata, and configuration. All other story-related artifacts reference the Story via its ifid. Compatible with Twine tw-storydata format for export.

fields.name: ifid
fields.description: Interactive Fiction Identifier (UUID v4, uppercase). Unique across all IF works. Format: XXXXXXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXXXXXXXXXX

fields.name: name
fields.description: Story title (displayed to players and in exports)

fields.name: start
fields.description: PID of the starting passage (must match a passage in the topology)

fields.name: logline
fields.description: One-sentence hook that captures the story's premise

fields.name: theme
fields.description: Central theme or message (e.g., 'redemption', 'consequences of power')

fields.name: current_pass
fields.description: Incremented each time story_spark runs a structure pass

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Tag definitions with colors for visual editors (Twine-compatible). Keys are tag names, values are color codes.

fields.name: creator_version
fields.description: Version of the authoring tool (QuestFoundry version)

states.name: Draft
states.description: Story is being planned and structured

states.name: Active
states.description: Story is in active development (prose, lore, media)

states.name: Complete
states.description: Story is finished and ready for export
